properties.entry:
select
count(*) total_records
from device_wlan_connections_fact dwcf
where dwcf.device_key = ?

with select_conn_w_limit as( select
dwcf.*
from device_wlan_connections_fact dwcf
where dwcf.device_key = ?
order by dwcf.device_key, dwcf.event_timestamp desc -- make the query full utilize the index
limit ?,? ) select
dd.date, td.time, dd1.device_name client_name, dd1.device_mac client_mac, id.ipv4 client_ipv4, ad.ap_mac, ad.ap_name, ifd.iface_name, ifd.iface_phy_name, ifd.iface_mac, vd.vendor_name client_vendor, vd1.vendor_name ap_vendor, csd.status connection_status
from select_conn_w_limit sl
join date_dim dd using (date_key)
join time_dim td using (time_key)
join device_dim dd1 using (device_key)
join ip_dim id on id.ip_key = sl.device_ip_key
join ap_dim ad using (ap_key)
join gw_iface_dim ifd using (iface_key)
join vendor_dim vd using (vendor_key)
join vendor_dim vd1 on vd1.vendor_key = sl.ap_vendor_key
join connection_status_dim csd on csd.id = sl.cnt_status_key
order by sl.event_timestamp desc;
